content: FOIT (invisible text) vs FOUT (flash of fallback then swap) both hurt CLS/FCP/LCP; font-related layout shift is ~15-20% of median page CLS. Best practice: self-host fonts, preload critical font with rel=preload as=font crossorigin, use font-display: swap (or optional for zero-CLS gold standard), and use size-adjust/ascent-override on a matched fallback font to eliminate shift, plus subsetting for smaller payload.
